narrative:
Port Clinton 1A (precinct in Ottawa County) has 923 registered voters, with 59.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 18.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.7%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.9 percentage points.
